headline: Aspen Power Announces CEO Transition; Co-Founder Jorge Vargas Leaving, Michael Sheehan Named Chief Executive Officer
summary: NEW YORK, April 23, 2026--Aspen Power, a leading distributed generation platform dedicated to building the clean energy future, announced that Jorge Vargas, co-founder and Chief Executive Officer, is leaving the role. Michael Sheehan, previously Chief Operating Officer of Dimension Energy, will assume the role of Chief Executive Officer at Aspen Power.
